candidate_definitions.text: Fast and accurate single-person pose estimation, ranked 10th at CVPR'19 LIP challenge. Contains implementation of "Global Context for Convolutional Pose Machines" paper.

This repository contains training code for the paper [Global Context for Convolutional Pose Machines](https://arxiv.org/pdf/1906.04104.pdf). This work improves [original](https://arxiv.org/pdf/1602.00134.pdf) convolutional pose machine architecture for artculated human pose esti…
